description: Stage 1 read-only tool definitions for IPAI Odoo Copilot Azure Foundry agent. OpenAI function-calling schema format.

function.name: read_record
function.description: Read field values from a specific Odoo record by model name and record ID. Returns the requested fields for the given record, subject to user ACL and company/entity scope checks.

record_id.description: The database ID of the record to read

fields.description: List of field names to read. If empty, reads all accessible fields.

function.name: search_records
function.description: Search Odoo records by domain filter and return matching records with specified fields. Uses Odoo's domain syntax for filtering.

domain.description: Odoo domain filter as a list of tuples, e.g. [['state', '=', 'draft'], ['amount_total', '>', 1000]]

fields.description: List of field names to return. If empty, returns name and id.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return. Default 20, max 100.

function.name: search_docs
function.description: Search the knowledge base for articles matching the query. Uses Azure AI Search or Odoo knowledge module depending on configuration.

kb_scope.description: Knowledge base scope to search within (e.g. 'general-kb', 'finance-close-kb', 'bir-compliance', 'marketing-playbooks')

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default 5, max 20.

function.name: get_report
function.description: Generate and return an Odoo report (PDF or data) for the specified records. Returns a summary of the report content.

report_name.description: The technical name of the report action (e.g. 'account.report_invoice', 'sale.report_saleorder')

record_ids.description: List of record IDs to include in the report

function.name: read_finance_close
function.description: Read the status and details of finance closing tasks for a given fiscal year and period. Returns closing task statuses, deadlines, and completion metrics.

function.name: view_campaign_perf
function.description: View performance metrics for a marketing campaign including impressions, clicks, conversions, spend, and ROI within a date range.

campaign_id.description: The database ID of the marketing campaign record

date_range.description: Date range for campaign performance data

function.name: view_dashboard
function.description: View analytics dashboard data including KPIs, charts, and summary metrics. Returns the dashboard configuration and current data snapshot.

dashboard_id.description: The database ID of the analytics dashboard

function.name: search_strategy_docs
function.description: Search strategy and playbook documents in the knowledge base. Scoped to strategy, planning, and operational playbook content.

query.description: The search query text for strategy documents

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default 5, max 20.
